recommendations.title: Escape from the 21st Century
recommendations.overview: Three friends discover that they have the power to travel back and forth 20 years with a sneeze. However, the future is not as good as they hope, and they need to take on the responsibility of saving the world.

recommendations.title: Maximum Ride
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Six children genetically cross-bred with avian DNA, complete with wings, take flight around the country to discover their origins.

recommendations.title: Watch the Skies
recommendations.overview: When a foster home placed teenage rebel suspects that her father is not dead but kidnapped by UFOs, she takes help from a UFO association to find out the truth. Together, they embark on a risky adventure that takes them far beyond the laws borders an

recommendations.title: Unidentified Flying Mater
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Mater finds a small UFO called Mator and they have a night out. Later, when Mator is captured by military forces, Mater sneaks up and saves him with the help of Lightning McQueen and the UFO's mother.

recommendations.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
recommendations.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

recommendations.title: Iron Man
recommendations.overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

recommendations.title: The Fifth Element
recommendations.overview: In 2257, a taxi driver is unintentionally given the task of saving a young girl who is part of the key that will ensure the survival of humanity.

recommendations.title: Robot Riot
recommendations.overview: Unconscious soldiers are dropped into a testing site only to discover their memories have been wiped and that once docile machines are the new intelligence.

recommendations.title: UFO
recommendations.overview: A college student, who sees a UFO, uses his exceptional math skills to investigate the sighting with his friends while the FBI follows closely behind.

recommendations.title: Puppy
recommendations.overview: A Minion, longing for a puppy, humorously tries to catch a dog, a squirrel, and even a ladybug, but none of his attempts succeed. Just as his hopes fade, a tiny UFO swoops down and abducts the ladybug. The Minion watches in fascination as the UFO, ma
